summary:
Anesthetics used during a paravertebral block are less prone to diffusing significantly when correctly administered; however, they have greater likelihood reaching nearby areas such as the subarachnoid space which shares similar pathways but isn't targeted thereby posing some minimal increased risk over other options listed here including those further away physically within body structure. To clarify based new insights gained post reevaluation:
